featureShowcases.heading: ZXSnake quick answers
featureShowcases.summary: The FAQ gives players short answers about ZXSnake features, progression, support, and current documentation status.
body: This matters because players often arrive with one specific question. The page should answer quickly and then point them to the deeper guide when needed.
Players use this page when they need support context without reading every guide page.
bullets: Links common questions back to the guide.
Keeps public wording clear and release-safe.

image.caption: ZXSnake FAQ artwork supports support and quick-answer context.

summary: ZXSnake FAQ answers common questions about gameplay, controls, achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and progression.
